dialogueLines.Speaker: Penelope
dialogueLines.text: Come on Irene! Who cares if the fog is thick, think of the memories we'll make!

choices.text: Try to sympathize but advise caution.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: Penny, I think it'd be fun, but this fog is too dense. We could get lost, or worse...

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: Penelope, no. You can't see five feet in front of you with this fog, it's too dangerous. There'll be other parties.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Penelope
dialogueLines.text: We could get lost...OR we could have the night of our lives! Come on, Irene, ta-loo-rye-aye, come on, Irene...

choices.text: Tell her to give it up.
Acknowledge the joke as stupid but funny.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Penelope
dialogueLines.text: Ughhh you're such a buzzkill sometimes Irene! You've always got some excuse to not go when you get invited to something fun.

choices.text: Maintain that you just want to be safe.
Tell her to just give it up.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: Okay, that was kinda funny in a stupid way...but I'm Irene, not Eileen, and I'm not going through that fog.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: Do you really need to be so mean Penny?.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: Listen, I just want us to be safe, okay? Why don't we just stay in and play Animal Crossing, or maybe watch a movie.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: Penelope, can you listen to someone other than yourself for once? It's not a good idea.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: I'd rather be a buzzkill than a ditz. I mean seriously, you can be so stupid sometimes. Do I really have to tell you that it's a bad idea to go into a dark, foggy forest?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Penelope
dialogueLines.text: Wow! It's cool if you're too scared to ever have fun, but you don't need to take it out on me Irene!

choices.text: Tell her that having fun and being stupid aren't the same.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Penelope
dialogueLines.text: Our neighborhoods will be there tomorrow, this party might never happen again!

choices.text: Tell her she can go if she wants, but you're staying back.
Tell her that you don't care what she does.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: Penny...I'm sorry I lost my patience, okay?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: Look, if you really don't wanna miss the party, go. I don't think it's safe, so I'll stay back okay?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: You can have fun without doing things that are dumb and potentially dangerous. I'm trying to offer alternatives but you aren't hearing it.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Irene
dialogueLines.text: Do whatever you want Penelope. If you really think the FOMO will kill you before crashing into a tree because of the fog does, just go.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Penelope
dialogueLines.text: Alright. I'll miss you, but I'm sure you'll miss me even more! Later!

dialogueLines.Speaker: Penelope
dialogueLines.text: I guess I'm not. Or maybe I'm tired of hearing it after so many times! If you don't want to spend time with me, just say that. Enjoy staying inside for the millionth time!

dialogueLines.Speaker: Penelope
dialogueLines.text: What a nice thing to say Irene! Since you're convinced I'm gonna wrap myself around a tree, I'll go do just that on my way to the party! B*%#!.
